title: Introduction to Functions
description: Learn to create and use functions

content.text:
Functions in Minecraft

Functions are text files containing multiple commands. They help organize and automate complex tasks.

Creating a Function:

  • Open your world folder
  • Navigate to datapacks folder
  • Create a new folder for your datapack
  • Create a function file with .mcfunction extension

Function Structure:

  • Each line is a command
  • Comments start with #
  • Commands run in order
  • No need for / at the start

Example Function:

# Give player items
give @s diamond 5
give @s iron_ingot 10

# Teleport player
tp @s 0 64 0

# Display message
say Welcome to the game!

Running Functions:

  • Use /function command
  • Can be triggered by command blocks
  • Can be called by other functions
content.task: Create a simple function that gives the player some items and displays a welcome message.
